compositionPolicy.server: SSR and the first hydration pass render only fallback unless disabled is true.
compositionPolicy.context: React context crosses the portal and the wrapper writes native dir/lang plus density attributes.
compositionPolicy.relationships: Consumers keep ID references unique and mounted on both sides of an accessible relationship.
compositionPolicy.advantage: The portal repeats locale, native direction, and density at the target instead of relying on React context alone.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: fallback=null removes server/first-hydration UI and accessibility output; disabled=true removes portal movement and target lookup while retaining the inline context boundary.
